steps.title: Token Foundation
steps.desc: Maintain verified EnergieMIND (ENM) Ethereum contract, publish official token documentation at enm.network, and establish transparent contract information for the ecosystem.

steps.title: Documentation & Transparency
steps.desc: Publish tokenomics, presale terms (when finalized), risk disclosures, and official communication channels. Maintain clear separation between enm.network (token) and other EnergieMIND ecosystem domains.

steps.title: Presale & Distribution
steps.desc: Launch presale when terms are finalized and officially announced. Implement vesting, allocation, and distribution according to published tokenomics.

steps.title: Utility Activation
steps.desc: Enable ecosystem utility functions related to energy intelligence participation, mining heat coordination, and pilot program frameworks as infrastructure matures.

steps.title: Partner & Pilot Network
steps.desc: Support pilot deployments for hotels, commercial buildings, solar sites, and miner-heater installations with token-coordinated participation models.

steps.title: Ecosystem Expansion
steps.desc: Develop community and partner programs, infrastructure incentive structures, and operational coordination tools within the EnergieMIND ecosystem.

steps.title: EnteleKRON Alignment
steps.desc: Prepare migration reserve and alignment framework for EnteleKRON mainnet modules, validator systems, and ecosystem-native settlement.

steps.title: Mainnet Migration
steps.desc: Execute migration alignment with EnteleKRON mainnet when technical, regulatory, and ecosystem conditions are met. Terms to be published in advance.

sections.title: General Disclaimer
sections.content: EnergieMIND (ENM) is not an investment recommendation, financial product, security offering or guaranteed return instrument. Crypto assets are high-risk and may lose value. Regulatory, technical, liquidity, market and operational risks apply. Always verify the contract address independently.

sections.title: Not an Investment Product
sections.content: EnergieMIND (ENM) is presented as a utility token for ecosystem coordination within the EnergieMIND energy intelligence network. It is not offered or described as an investment product, security, equity interest, debt instrument, or financial derivative. Nothing on enm.network constitutes financial advice, investment advice, or a recommendation to buy, sell, or hold any crypto asset.

sections.title: No Guaranteed Returns
sections.content: EnergieMIND (ENM) does not promise, guarantee, or imply any return on investment, passive income, profit, appreciation, or yield. Past performance of any crypto asset is not indicative of future results. You may lose part or all of any value associated with ENM.

sections.title: Not a Security Offering
sections.content: EnergieMIND (ENM) is not offered as a security under any jurisdiction. Regulatory classification of crypto tokens varies by country and may change. You are solely responsible for understanding and complying with applicable laws in your jurisdiction.

sections.title: Market and Liquidity Risks
sections.content: Crypto markets are volatile. ENM may have limited or no liquidity. Prices can fluctuate dramatically or become untradeable. There is no assurance of any secondary market, exchange listing, or trading venue.

sections.title: Technical Risks
sections.content: Smart contracts, blockchain networks, and wallet software carry inherent technical risks including bugs, exploits, network failures, forks, and irreversible transactions. The EnergieMIND (ENM) contract currently indicates transfer restrictions. Always verify contract behavior on Etherscan before interacting.

sections.title: Regulatory Risks
sections.content: Cryptocurrency regulations are evolving globally. Future regulatory actions may restrict, prohibit, or impose requirements on ENM holders, transfers, or ecosystem participation. Compliance obligations may vary by jurisdiction.

sections.title: Operational Risks
sections.content: Ecosystem development, presale execution, utility activation, and mainnet migration are subject to technical, operational, and resource constraints. Roadmap items are planning milestones, not binding commitments or guarantees of delivery.

sections.title: Contract Verification
sections.content: The official EnergieMIND (ENM) contract address is 0x00faB8baFfF3f849dd23FF68cfE51d8E3d09937D on Ethereum Mainnet. Always verify this address independently on Etherscan. Do not trust addresses from unofficial sources, social media messages, or third-party websites. Scam tokens may use similar names.

sections.title: Presale Caution
sections.content: Only use wallet addresses published on enm.network/wallets. The official presale contribution wallet is the EnergieMIND Treasury address on Ethereum Mainnet. Do not send funds to addresses from social media, DMs, or third-party sites. EnergieMIND (ENM) is not an investment product or guaranteed return instrument.

sections.title: Your Responsibility
sections.content: By accessing enm.network or interacting with EnergieMIND (ENM), you acknowledge that you understand these risks and accept full responsibility for your decisions. Consult qualified legal, tax, and financial professionals before making any decisions related to crypto assets.

faq.description: Frequently asked questions about EnergieMIND (ENM), contract, presale, tokenomics, and the EnergieMIND ecosystem.

faq.riskFooter: Crypto assets are high-risk and may lose value. Regulatory, technical, liquidity, market and operational risks apply. Always verify the contract address independently.

items.a: EnergieMIND (ticker: ENM) is the utility token of the EnergieMIND energy intelligence ecosystem. It is an ERC-20 token on Ethereum Mainnet, designed for future ecosystem coordination related to energy intelligence, mining heat participation, pilot programs, and EnteleKRON mainnet alignment. ENM is a utility token — not an investment product.

items.q: What are the official EnergieMIND domains?
items.a: energiemind.com — main corporate/project website; energiemind.io — technology platform, dashboard, and app; energiemind.network — partners, nodes, miner-heaters, and energy network; energiemind.org — sustainability, research, and public mission; energiemind.shop — shop for miners, miner-heaters, solar, and energy products; enm.network — EnergieMIND (ENM), presale, and token documentation (this site).

items.q: How does EnergieMIND relate to EnteleKRON, TVK Group, and TVK Labs?
items.a: EnergieMIND (ENM) is the energy-intelligence utility token documented on enm.network. EnteleKRON is the planned mainnet alignment ecosystem referenced in the ENM roadmap — alignment is a technical direction, not a guarantee of migration, value, or return. TVK Group is the corporate project host (energiemind.com). TVK Labs supports technology development (energiemind.io). The investor portal workflow is similar to EnteleKRON and SOVRA protocol portals, but those are separate projects. Nothing on enm.network presents ENM as an investment product.

items.q: What is the difference between enm.network and energiemind.com?
items.a: enm.network is dedicated to EnergieMIND (ENM): contract, tokenomics, presale, investor portal, and risk disclosures. energiemind.com is the main corporate and project website. Other ecosystem functions use energiemind.io, energiemind.network, energiemind.org, and energiemind.shop.

items.q: What is the official contract address?
items.a: The official EnergieMIND (ENM) contract on Ethereum Mainnet is 0x00faB8baFfF3f849dd23FF68cfE51d8E3d09937D. Always verify this address independently on Etherscan before interacting.

items.q: Can I transfer ENM right now?
items.a: According to the current verified contract, transfers are restricted or locked. Check the contract status on Etherscan for the latest on-chain state before attempting any transfer.

No. EnergieMIND (ENM) is not presented as an investment product, security offering, guaranteed return instrument, or passive income promise. It is a utility token for ecosystem coordination. Crypto assets are high-risk and may lose value. See the full risk notice.

Early Investor: 01 Jul – 30 Sep 2026. Strategic Investor: 01 Oct – 31 Dec 2026. Private Sale: 01 Jan – 31 Mar 2027. Public Presale: from 01 Apr 2027 in six 6-week stages. See the presale page and investor portal for live status.
The maximum total supply is 50,000,000,000 ENM (50 billion) with 18 decimals. Allocation percentages across categories are pending official publication on the tokenomics page.

EnergieMIND (ENM) is prepared for future migration and alignment with the EnteleKRON mainnet ecosystem. A migration reserve allocation category is planned. Specific migration terms, timelines, and technical details will be published when available.

items.q: How do I add ENM to my wallet?
items.a: Use the official contract address 0x00faB8baFfF3f849dd23FF68cfE51d8E3d09937D with ticker symbol ENM and 18 decimals. Verify the address on Etherscan. Be aware that transfers may currently be restricted per the contract state.

items.q: Where can I get official updates?
items.a: Official EnergieMIND (ENM) information is published on enm.network. For inquiries, use the contact page. Do not trust unofficial channels, social media DMs, or third-party sites for contract addresses or presale information.
